## XPlugin.(constructor)

Creates a new instance of the XPlugin with the given bus passed as parameter.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
constructor(bus: XBus);
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  bus | [XBus](./x-components.xbus.md) | The [XBus](./x-components.xbus.md) implementation to use for the plugin. |
